summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WebSocket, Task defer/redirect, and all new features. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - WebSocket connection shows 'Live' badge, navigation works, dialogs work, search works.
passed_tests: Backend: WebSocket ping/pong works at /api/ws
Backend: WebSocket sync_state returns approvalQueue, actionItems, activity
Backend: WebSocket broadcasts events on approval actions
Backend: POST /api/tasks accepts priority and agent_note fields
Backend: POST /api/tasks/{id}/defer postpones task with new due_date and reason
Backend: POST /api/tasks/{id}/redirect sends task back with note and priority
Backend: Defer/redirect on non-existent task returns 404
Backend: GET /api/approvals?search=keyword filters results correctly
Backend: Templates CRUD (create, read, delete) works
Backend: All existing endpoints work (brands, stats, approvals, tasks, inboxes, activity, agentmail)
Frontend: WebSocket shows 'Live' badge in topbar when connected
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Connected' with green dot when WebSocket connected
Frontend: Overview page renders all cards (stats, approvals, tasks, inboxes, calendar)
Frontend: Approval Queue renders with search bar
Frontend: Approval search filters results (385 -> 44 for 'product', 0 for non-existent)
Frontend: Tasks Kanban board renders with Open/In Progress/Completed columns
Frontend: Inboxes list shows AgentMail inboxes
Frontend: Calendar view renders with Add Calendar Feed button
Frontend: Activity Feed shows real-time activity
Frontend: Compose dialog with template support works
Frontend: New Task dialog works
Frontend: Brand filtering works across all views
Frontend: Navigation between all views works (Overview, Approvals, Tasks, Inboxes, Calendar, Activity)
seed_data_creation: Created test tasks during testing (prefixed with TEST_) for defer/redirect testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: WebSocket real-time updates, task defer/redirect, approval search, templates CRUD, all navigation views. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_websocket_and_tasks.py covers WebSocket, task operations, and regression tests. AgentMail integration is real (not mocked). Task count is now 12+ due to test tasks created.
